violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of bio-film. Shelving to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese and butter) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as butter and cheese during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

Raw animal foods (such as bacon) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as hot dogs) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as hot dogs during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

Raw animal foods (such as bacon) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as water) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as water during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

Food was observed held at 47-49 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge food had been in the walk-in cooler since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 47 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Walk-in cooler must not be used to store any time/temperature control for safety foods until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Person in charge placed a service call during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

The floors under and around the 3-bay sink and retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
